summary: D13: deploy/deploy.sh — 5-step idempotent script (clone releases/<sha>, npm ci --omit=dev, symlink swap, systemctl restart, prune to last 5)
description:
5-step idempotent script per §7.8. Clone to /srv/guru-web/releases/<sha>, run npm ci --omit=dev + npm run build in that dir, swap /srv/guru-web/current symlink, sudo systemctl restart guru-web, prune to last 5 releases.

ACCESS PATTERN (decided 2026-04-22): deploy.sh runs on the VPS, invoked over SSH from the GitHub Actions runner. The runner reaches the VPS via Tailscale — not public SSH. UFW allows port 22 only on tailscale0. Script itself doesn't know/care about the access mechanism — just needs to be at /srv/guru-web/deploy.sh, owned by deploy:deploy, executable. E17 is the workflow that wires up the Tailscale + SSH invocation.

Should run as 'deploy' user (home /home/deploy, created by bootstrap). Needs sudo to systemctl restart guru-web — bootstrap already installs /etc/sudoers.d/deploy with NOPASSWD for that one command.

resolution.note: deploy/deploy.sh written per §7.8: 5-step idempotent (fetch SHA → npm ci + build → symlink swap → systemctl restart + verify → prune to 5). Symlink target is .next/standalone/ so the systemd unit's ExecStart=/usr/bin/node server.js works unchanged. Also updated vps-bootstrap.sh to install deploy.sh to /srv/guru-web/deploy.sh as the fixed CI entry point.
